title: Go thumbnail local implementation candidate

implementation.db_behavior: sqlite_query_only remains true because thumbnail candidate writes files only
implementation.production_guard: production-like knowledge.db still requires PRISM_GO_ALLOW_PROD_DB=1; thumbnail writes additionally require PRISM_GO_ALLOW_PROD_UPLOADS=1
implementation.resize_algorithm: nearest-neighbor local candidate, not final Pillow pixel-quality parity

dependency_changes.dependency_reason: first spike candidate selected by 23.8-thumb.1; pure Go WebP encode/decode registration and quality controls
dependency_changes.packaging_risk: builders now need Go 1.26.1 or newer for go-shadow

linux_arm64_cgo0_build.command: cd go-shadow; GOOS=linux GOARCH=arm64 CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -o ../build/phase23-thumb4/prism-go-runtime-thumb4-linux-arm64 .

unit_coverage: default disabled route returns 405 and writes no files
enabled thumbnail candidate keeps sqlite_query_only true
invalid content returns 400 and writes no files

not_authorized_by_23_8_thumb_4: Route frontend or Caddy traffic to Go upload
Write production DB or production uploads
Declare pixel-quality parity with Pillow LANCZOS

allowed_next_step.title: Go thumbnail surface expansion or removal-readiness gate
allowed_next_step.summary: Decide whether to extend Go thumbnail coverage to upload-url and import helper, or explicitly retain those Python surfaces before any future Pillow removal gate.
